---
title: "S4A Phase 1: pooling analysis"
author: "Tushar Garg"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=F,message=F, warning=F)
suppressMessages(if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman"))
pacman::p_load(tidyverse,rio,janitor,here,lubridate, hms)
pacman::p_load(binGroup2)
source(here::here("Scripts","0.functions.R"))
```

```{r import}
# Using file generated by data team
master <- import(here("Data",data_format_with_ct))
 
# master <- import(here("Data",folder_name,"data_format.csv"))

master_pool <- import(here("Data",folder_name,"pooled_xpert_ultra.csv")) %>% 
  rename(poolsize = no_samp_in_pool)

master_ind_xpert_local <- import(here("Data",folder_name,"xpert_result_local_lab.csv"))

master_ind_xpert_ref <- import(here("Data",folder_name,"xpert_result_reference_lab.csv"))

lvl_xpert <- c("pos","trace","neg","invalid","error","noresult")
```

```{r individual xpert fixing date and time}
# ----- helpers -----
parse_dt_any <- function(x) {
  # robust POSIXct parser for mixed date/time strings
  parse_date_time(
    x,
    orders = c("Y-m-d H:M:S", "Y-m-d H:M", "Y-m-d",
               "d/m/Y H:M:S", "d/m/Y H:M", "d/m/Y",
               "m/d/Y H:M:S", "m/d/Y H:M", "m/d/Y"),
    tz = "UTC",
    quiet = TRUE
  )
}

parse_time_any <- function(x) {
  # parse time-only strings like "13:35" or "13:35:10"
  if (is.null(x)) return(as_hms(NA))
  x_dt <- parse_date_time(x, orders = c("H:M:S", "H:M"), tz = "UTC", quiet = TRUE)
  as_hms(x_dt)
}

clean_date_time_pairs <- function(df, pairs) {
  out <- df
  for (pr in pairs) {
    dcol <- pr[1]
    tcol <- pr[2]

    if (!all(c(dcol, tcol) %in% names(out))) next

    # parse date column; it may contain date or datetime
    dt_parsed <- parse_dt_any(out[[dcol]])

    # extract time embedded in date, if any
    time_from_date <- as_hms(dt_parsed)

    # parse standalone time column
    time_parsed <- parse_time_any(out[[tcol]])

    # choose time: prefer explicit time; else time embedded in date; else NA
    time_clean <- ifelse(!is.na(time_parsed), time_parsed, time_from_date)
    time_clean <- as_hms(time_clean)

    # clean date to pure Date
    date_clean <- as_date(dt_parsed)

    out[[dcol]] <- date_clean
    out[[tcol]] <- time_clean
  }
  out
}

# ----- define pairs to clean -----
local_pairs <- list(
  c("xpert_s1_mtb_date", "xpert_s1_mtb_time"),
  c("xpert_s2_mtb_date", "xpert_s2_mtb_time")
)

ref_pairs <- list(
  c("xpert_rs1_mtb_date", "xpert_rs1_mtb_time"),
  c("xpert_rs2_mtb_date", "xpert_rs2_mtb_time"),
  c("date_sample_rec_xptref", "time_sample_rec_xptref")
)

# keep only pairs that actually exist in the data frames
local_pairs <- keep(local_pairs, ~ all(.x %in% names(master_ind_xpert_local)))
ref_pairs   <- keep(ref_pairs,   ~ all(.x %in% names(master_ind_xpert_ref)))

# ----- clean in place -----
master_ind_xpert_local <- clean_date_time_pairs(master_ind_xpert_local, local_pairs)
master_ind_xpert_ref   <- clean_date_time_pairs(master_ind_xpert_ref,   ref_pairs)

```

```{r individual xpert FINAL choice with details}
# This piece of code is aligned to SQL code used to generate data_format.csv
# Individual Xpert in local lab and ref lab files is combined to choose one xpert result for each regno
# All other variables for xpert like ct value

# --- Step 1: Standardize column names ---
ref <- master_ind_xpert_ref %>%
  rename_with(~ str_replace(., "^xpert_rs", "xpert_s"))

# --- Step 2: Extract runs from local ---
local_1 <- master_ind_xpert_local %>%
  mutate(
    xpert_used = xpert_s_used,
    Xpert_result = xpert_s1_mtb,
    mtb_grade = xpert_s1_mtbgrade,
    mtb_rif = xpert_s1_rif,
    is1081 = xpert_s1_ct_is1081,
    rpob1 = xpert_s1_ct_rpob1,
    rpob2 = xpert_s1_ct_rpob2,
    rpob3 = xpert_s1_ct_rpob3,
    rpob4 = xpert_s1_ct_rpob4,
    date = as.Date(xpert_s1_mtb_date),
    time = as_hms(xpert_s1_mtb_time),
    repeated = 0
  ) %>%
  select(regno, Country_Name, xpert_used, Xpert_result, mtb_grade, mtb_rif,
         is1081, rpob1, rpob2, rpob3, rpob4, date, time, repeated)

local_2 <- master_ind_xpert_local %>%
  filter(xpert_s_repeated == 1 & !is.na(xpert_s2_mtb)) %>%
  mutate(
    xpert_used = xpert_s_used,
    Xpert_result = xpert_s2_mtb,
    mtb_grade = xpert_s2_mtbgrade,
    mtb_rif = xpert_s2_rif,
    is1081 = xpert_s2_ct_is1081,
    rpob1 = xpert_s2_ct_rpob1,
    rpob2 = xpert_s2_ct_rpob2,
    rpob3 = xpert_s2_ct_rpob3,
    rpob4 = xpert_s2_ct_rpob4,
    date = as.Date(xpert_s2_mtb_date),
    time = as_hms(xpert_s2_mtb_time),
    repeated = 1
  ) %>%
  select(regno, Country_Name, xpert_used, Xpert_result, mtb_grade, mtb_rif,
         is1081, rpob1, rpob2, rpob3, rpob4, date, time, repeated)

# --- Step 3: Extract runs from reference ---
ref_1 <- ref %>%
  mutate(
    xpert_used = NA,
    Xpert_result = xpert_s1_mtb,
    mtb_grade = xpert_s1_mtbgrade,
    mtb_rif = xpert_s1_rif,
    is1081 = xpert_s1_ct_is1081,
    rpob1 = xpert_s1_ct_rpob1,
    rpob2 = xpert_s1_ct_rpob2,
    rpob3 = xpert_s1_ct_rpob3,
    rpob4 = xpert_s1_ct_rpob4,
    date = as.Date(xpert_s1_mtb_date),
    time = as_hms(xpert_s1_mtb_time),
    repeated = 0
  ) %>%
  select(regno, Country_Name, xpert_used, Xpert_result, mtb_grade, mtb_rif,
         is1081, rpob1, rpob2, rpob3, rpob4, date, time, repeated)

ref_2 <- ref %>%
  filter(xpert_s_repeated == 1 & !is.na(xpert_s2_mtb)) %>%
  mutate(
    xpert_used = NA,
    Xpert_result = xpert_s2_mtb,
    mtb_grade = xpert_s2_mtbgrade,
    mtb_rif = xpert_s2_rif,
    is1081 = xpert_s2_ct_is1081,
    rpob1 = xpert_s2_ct_rpob1,
    rpob2 = xpert_s2_ct_rpob2,
    rpob3 = xpert_s2_ct_rpob3,
    rpob4 = xpert_s2_ct_rpob4,
    date = as.Date(xpert_s2_mtb_date),
    time = as_hms(xpert_s2_mtb_time),
    repeated = 1
  ) %>%
  select(regno, Country_Name, xpert_used, Xpert_result, mtb_grade, mtb_rif,
         is1081, rpob1, rpob2, rpob3, rpob4, date, time, repeated)

# --- Step 4: Combine all sources ---
# Merge all four dataframes (local_1, local_2, ref_1, ref_2) into one.
# Each row represents one Xpert test result — first or repeat, local or reference.
# Then create a "True_Result" variable that assigns a ranking value
# to the Xpert_result code (used later for prioritization).
# The logic follows the SQL code from Segun used in generating data_format.csv:
#   - Results 1 or 2 = 3 (strongest / most conclusive)
#   - Results 3, 4, 5 = 2 (intermediate)
#   - Result 6 = 1 (weakest)
#   - All others = 0 (invalid / missing)
merged_xpert_result <- bind_rows(local_1, local_2, ref_1, ref_2) %>%
  mutate(
    True_Result = case_when(
      Xpert_result %in% c(1, 2) ~ 3,
      Xpert_result %in% c(3, 4, 5) ~ 2,
      Xpert_result == 6 ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    )
  )

# --- Step 5: Select most relevant result per regno ---
# For each participant (regno), multiple Xpert results may exist from local or reference labs.
# This step keeps only ONE "most relevant" record per regno, based on a clear priority hierarchy.
#
# 1. True_Result → highest category (3 strongest > 2 > 1 > 0)
# 2. xpert_rank  → within the same True_Result, prefer Xpert_result = 1 over 2
#                  (since 1 usually represents a stronger or more definitive MTB detection)
# 3. repeated    → if still tied, prefer the repeat run (repeated = 1)
# 4. date/time   → if all else is equal, prefer the earlier run (chronologically first)
#
# This logic ensures that when both Xpert_result 1 and 2 exist for a patient,
# the row with Xpert_result = 1 is always selected.
all_xperts <- merged_xpert_result %>%
  mutate(xpert_rank = case_when(
    Xpert_result == 1 ~ 2L,
    Xpert_result == 2 ~ 1L,
    TRUE ~ 0L
  )) %>%
  arrange(
    regno,               # group identifier
    desc(True_Result),   # 1. prioritize strongest Xpert category
    desc(repeated),      # 2. within same True_Result, prefer repeat runs
    date, time,          # 3. within same True_Result + repeat, prefer earlier result
    desc(xpert_rank)     # 4. fine-tune between Xpert_result 1 vs 2
  ) %>%
  group_by(regno) %>%
  slice_head(n = 1) %>%  # keep the top-ranked record per regno
  ungroup()


master_xpert_ind <- merged_xpert_result %>%
  mutate(xpert_rank = case_when(
    Xpert_result == 1 ~ 2L,
    Xpert_result == 2 ~ 1L,
    TRUE ~ 0L
  )) %>%
  arrange(regno, desc(True_Result), desc(xpert_rank), desc(repeated), date, time) %>%
  group_by(regno) %>%
  slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  filter(regno != "")
```


```{r xpert pool xpert result with details}
lvl_xpert <- c("pos","trace","neg","invalid","error","noresult")

# Recode pooled xpert values
master_pool <- master_pool %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(c("xpert_p1_mtb", "xpert_p2_mtb")),
      ~ case_when(
        as.integer(.) == 1 ~ "pos",
        as.integer(.) == 2 ~ "neg",
        as.integer(.) == 3 ~ "trace",
        as.integer(.) == 4 ~ "invalid",
        as.integer(.) == 5 ~ "error",
        as.integer(.) == 6 ~ "noresult",
        TRUE               ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(all_of(c("xpert_p1_mtb", "xpert_p2_mtb")), ~ factor(., levels = lvl_xpert))
  ) %>% 
  mutate(Country_Name = if_else(Country_Name %in% c("Nigeria JHF", "Nigeria ZRC"), "Nigeria", Country_Name))

# create a final pooled result based on repeated pooled result = xpert_p_mtb
master_pool <- master_pool %>%
  mutate(
    # --- choose source (p1 vs p2) used for final pooled values ---
    p_source = case_when(
      # If P2 is NA, keep P1
      is.na(xpert_p2_mtb) ~ "p1",
      # If P2 is (pos/trace), prefer P2 over P1
      as.character(xpert_p2_mtb) %in% c("pos","trace") ~ "p2",
      # If P1 is inconclusive (invalid/error/noresult), fall back to P2
      as.character(xpert_p1_mtb) %in% c("invalid","error","noresult") ~ "p2",
      # If P1 is pos/trace but P2 is not, keep P1 (protect P1 positives)
      as.character(xpert_p1_mtb) %in% c("pos","trace") & 
        !as.character(xpert_p2_mtb) %in% c("pos","trace") ~ "p1",
      # Otherwise default to P1 (e.g., both neg, or P2 non-informative)
      TRUE ~ "p1"
    ),

    # --- create final pooled result (xpert_p_mtb) based on chosen source ---
    xpert_p_mtb = if_else(
      p_source == "p2", 
      as.character(xpert_p2_mtb), 
      as.character(xpert_p1_mtb)
    ) |> factor(levels = lvl_xpert),

    # --- pull other variables from the chosen pooled run (p1 or p2) ---
    xpert_p_mtbgrade  = if_else(p_source == "p2", xpert_p2_mtbgrade,  xpert_p1_mtbgrade),
    xpert_p_rif       = if_else(p_source == "p2", xpert_p2_rif,       xpert_p1_rif),
    xpert_p_ct_is1081 = if_else(p_source == "p2", xpert_p2_ct_is1081, xpert_p1_ct_is1081),
    xpert_p_ct_rpob1  = if_else(p_source == "p2", xpert_p2_ct_rpob1,  xpert_p1_ct_rpob1),
    xpert_p_ct_rpob2  = if_else(p_source == "p2", xpert_p2_ct_rpob2,  xpert_p1_ct_rpob2),
    xpert_p_ct_rpob3  = if_else(p_source == "p2", xpert_p2_ct_rpob3,  xpert_p1_ct_rpob3),
    xpert_p_ct_rpob4  = if_else(p_source == "p2", xpert_p2_ct_rpob4,  xpert_p1_ct_rpob4),
    xpert_p_time_t    = if_else(p_source == "p2", xpert_p2_time_t,    xpert_p1_time_t),
    xpert_p_date      = if_else(p_source == "p2", xpert_p2_date,      xpert_p1_date),
    xpert_p_time_r    = if_else(p_source == "p2", xpert_p2_time_r,    xpert_p1_time_r),

    # --- cartridge count: 2 if both p1 & p2 done, 1 if only one done ---
    cartridge_used = case_when(
      !is.na(xpert_p1_mtb) & !is.na(xpert_p2_mtb) ~ 2L,
      is.na(xpert_p1_mtb) | is.na(xpert_p2_mtb) ~ 1L,
      TRUE ~ NA_integer_
    )
  )
```


```{r}
# Recode xpert
master <- recode_xpert_pool_results(master,
                                    xpert_result_col = "Xpert_result",
                                    pool_result_col  = "pool_resultt",
                                    xpert_trace = c("as_pos"),
                                    pool_trace  = c("as_pos_xpert"))

pool_size <- master_pool %>% select(poolno, poolsize, xpert_p_no_1:xpert_p_no_4) %>% 
    mutate(poolno = stringr::str_trim(poolno))


pool_summary <-  master %>% 
  group_by(poolno, xpert) %>% 
  summarise(n=n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  filter(poolno != "") %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = xpert, values_from = n) %>% 
  mutate(poolno = if_else(poolno %in% as.character(1:46),
                          sprintf("%04d", as.integer(poolno)),
                          poolno)) %>% 
  left_join(.,pool_size,
          by = "poolno") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(poolsize))
```

```{r}
ct_detail <- pool_summary %>% 
  mutate(n_pos = case_when(pos == 1 ~ "positiveone",
                           pos > 1 ~ "positivemoreone",
                           TRUE ~ NA)) %>% 
  
  left_join(., master_pool %>% 
              select(
                poolno,xpert_p_mtb,xpert_p_mtbgrade,xpert_p_rif,
                xpert_p_ct_is1081,
                xpert_p_ct_rpob1,xpert_p_ct_rpob2,xpert_p_ct_rpob3,xpert_p_ct_rpob4  
              ),
            by = "poolno") %>% 
  filter(!is.na(n_pos)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = xpert_p_no_1:xpert_p_no_4,
    names_to = "xpert_p_no_index",
    values_to = "regno"
  ) %>% 
  left_join(. , master_xpert_ind %>% select(1:rpob4),
            by="regno")


missing_ct_pool <- ct_detail %>% 
  filter(xpert_p_mtb %in% c("pos", "trace")) %>%
  mutate(ct_status = case_when(
    is.na(xpert_p_ct_is1081) ~ "Missing",
    xpert_p_ct_is1081 == 0 ~ "Zero",
    TRUE ~ "Present"
  )) %>%
  count(xpert_p_mtb, ct_status) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = ct_status, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)


missing_ct_ind <- ct_detail %>% 
  mutate(
    xpert_result_cat = case_when(
      Xpert_result == 1 ~ "pos",
      Xpert_result == 3 ~ "trace",
      Xpert_result == 2 ~ "neg",
      TRUE ~ "other"
    ),
    is1081_status = case_when(
      is.na(is1081) ~ "Missing",
      is1081 == 0 ~ "Zero",
      TRUE ~ "Present"
    )
  ) %>%
  count(xpert_result_cat, is1081_status) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = is1081_status, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>% 
  filter(xpert_result_cat %in% c("pos", "trace")) 


p1_tab <- master_pool %>%
  filter(xpert_p1_mtb %in% c("pos", "trace")) %>%
  mutate(is1081_status = case_when(
    is.na(xpert_p1_ct_is1081) ~ "Missing",
    xpert_p1_ct_is1081 == 0 ~ "Zero",
    TRUE ~ "Present"
  )) %>%
  count(xpert_p1_mtb, is1081_status) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = is1081_status, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

p2_tab <- master_pool %>%
  filter(xpert_p2_mtb %in% c("pos", "trace")) %>%
  mutate(is1081_status = case_when(
    is.na(xpert_p2_ct_is1081) ~ "Missing",
    xpert_p2_ct_is1081 == 0 ~ "Zero",
    TRUE ~ "Present"
  )) %>%
  count(xpert_p2_mtb, is1081_status) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = is1081_status, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

list(P1 = p1_tab, P2 = p2_tab)

ct_include <- ct_detail %>% 
  filter(Xpert_result %in% c(1,3)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(is1081)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(xpert_p_ct_is1081) & xpert_p_ct_is1081 != 0) %>% 
  mutate(
    poolsize = as.integer(poolsize),
    ind_ct = readr::parse_number(as.character(is1081)),
    pool_ct = readr::parse_number(as.character(xpert_p_ct_is1081))
  ) 

ct_inc_p1 <- ct_include %>% 
  filter(n_pos == "positiveone")

ct_inc_p1plus <- ct_include %>% 
  filter(n_pos == "positivemoreone")

```

```{r}
# --- Prep (single-positive pools only) ---
df_ct <- ct_inc_p1 

# --- Scatter plot (Individual vs Pool Ct) ---
ggplot(df_ct, aes(x = ind_ct, y = pool_ct)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = factor(poolsize)), size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17, 15),
                     name = "Pool size",
                     labels = c("2", "3", "4")) +
  labs(x = expression("Individual"~C[t]~value),
       y = expression("Pooled"~C[t]~value)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

```

```{r}
# --- Prep (single-positive pools only) ---
df_ct <- ct_inc_p1 %>%
  group_by(poolsize) %>%
  arrange(is1081, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(spec_rank = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

df_long <- df_ct %>%
  select(poolsize, spec_rank, is1081, xpert_p_ct_is1081) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(is1081, xpert_p_ct_is1081),
               names_to = "assay", values_to = "ct") %>%
  mutate(assay = recode(assay,
                        "is1081" = "Individual test (IS1081)",
                        "xpert_p_ct_is1081" = "Pool test (IS1081)"))

# --- Plot (left panel analogue) ---
ggplot() +
  geom_segment(
    data = df_ct,
    aes(x = is1081, xend = xpert_p_ct_is1081,
        y = spec_rank, yend = spec_rank),
    alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_long,
    aes(x = ct, y = spec_rank, shape = assay),
    size = 2.3
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 15), name = NULL) +
  facet_wrap(~ poolsize, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(poolsize = function(z) paste0("Pool size = ", z))) +
  labs(x = expression(C[t]~value),
       y = "Individual specimens (ordered by Ct)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

```


```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse)

df2 <- ct_inc_p1plus

# order pools by min individual Ct
pool_order <- df2 %>%
  group_by(poolsize, poolno) %>%
  summarise(min_ind_ct = min(ind_ct), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(poolsize, min_ind_ct) %>%
  group_by(poolsize) %>%
  mutate(pool_rank = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

df_plot <- df2 %>%
  left_join(pool_order %>% select(poolsize, poolno, pool_rank),
            by = c("poolsize","poolno"))

df_pool_points <- df_plot %>%
  group_by(poolsize, poolno, pool_rank) %>%
  summarise(pool_ct = unique(pool_ct), .groups = "drop")

# --- Plot ---
ggplot() +
  geom_segment(
    data = df_plot,
    aes(x = ind_ct, xend = pool_ct, y = pool_rank, yend = pool_rank),
    alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_plot,
    aes(x = ind_ct, y = pool_rank, shape = "Individual test (IS1081)"),
    size = 2.3
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_pool_points,
    aes(x = pool_ct, y = pool_rank, shape = "Pool test (IS1081)"),
    size = 2.6
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Individual test (IS1081)" = 16,
                                "Pool test (IS1081)" = 15),
                     name = NULL) +
  facet_wrap(~ poolsize, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(poolsize = function(z) paste0("Pool size = ", z))) +
  labs(x = expression(C[t]~value),
       y = "Pools (ordered by min individual Ct)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


```







```{r}
# === 1) ΔCt (shift) and distributions ===
df_shift <- df_ct %>%
  mutate(delta_ct = pool_ct - ind_ct)

# Summary by pool size
shift_summ <- df_shift %>%
  group_by(poolsize) %>%
  summarise(n = n(),
            mean = mean(delta_ct, na.rm = TRUE),
            median = median(delta_ct, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd = sd(delta_ct, na.rm = TRUE),
            min = min(delta_ct, na.rm = TRUE),
            max = max(delta_ct, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")
shift_summ

# Boxplot of ΔCt by pool size
ggplot(df_shift, aes(x = factor(poolsize), y = delta_ct)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = "Pool size", y = expression(Delta*C[t]~"(Pool - Individual)")) +
  theme_minimal()

# Density of ΔCt by pool size
ggplot(df_shift, aes(x = delta_ct, group = factor(poolsize))) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4, aes(linetype = factor(poolsize))) +
  labs(x = expression(Delta*C[t]), y = "Density", linetype = "Pool size") +
  theme_minimal()

# === 2) Correlation & regression ===
# Scatter with 1:1 and smooth per pool size
ggplot(df_ct, aes(x = ind_ct, y = pool_ct, shape = factor(poolsize))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_shape_discrete(name = "Pool size") +
  labs(x = expression("Individual"~C[t]), y = expression("Pooled"~C[t])) +
  theme_minimal()

# Linear model (pool Ct ~ individual Ct + pool size)
fit_main <- lm(pool_ct ~ ind_ct + factor(poolsize), data = df_ct)
summary(fit_main)

# === 3) Bland–Altman (agreement) ===
df_ba <- df_ct %>%
  mutate(mean_ct = (pool_ct + ind_ct)/2,
         diff_ct = pool_ct - ind_ct)

ba_stats <- df_ba %>%
  group_by(poolsize) %>%
  summarise(bias = mean(diff_ct, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd_d = sd(diff_ct, na.rm = TRUE),
            loa_low = bias - 1.96*sd_d,
            loa_high = bias + 1.96*sd_d,
            .groups = "drop")

ggplot(df_ba, aes(x = mean_ct, y = diff_ct)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(data = ba_stats, aes(yintercept = bias)) +
  geom_hline(data = ba_stats, aes(yintercept = loa_low), linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_hline(data = ba_stats, aes(yintercept = loa_high), linetype = "dotted") +
  facet_wrap(~ poolsize, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = expression("Mean"~C[t]), y = expression(Delta*C[t])) +
  theme_minimal()

# === 4) Observed vs theoretical shift ===
df_theo <- df_shift %>%
  mutate(expected_shift = log2(poolsize),
         excess_shift = delta_ct - expected_shift)

# Boxplot of ΔCt with theoretical lines
ggplot(df_theo, aes(x = factor(poolsize), y = delta_ct)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(data = distinct(df_theo, poolsize, expected_shift),
             aes(yintercept = expected_shift), linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(x = "Pool size",
       y = expression(Delta*C[t]~"(observed)"),
       subtitle = "Dashed = theoretical log2(pool size)") +
  theme_minimal()

# Excess shift summary
excess_summ <- df_theo %>%
  group_by(poolsize) %>%
  summarise(mean_excess = mean(excess_shift, na.rm = TRUE),
            median_excess = median(excess_shift, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd_excess = sd(excess_shift, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")
excess_summ

# === 6) Simple dilution–response model ===
fit_dilution <- lm((pool_ct - ind_ct) ~ log2(poolsize), data = df_ct)
summary(fit_dilution)
confint(fit_dilution)

# Mean ΔCt vs log2(poolsize) with expected line (=1 slope)
mean_shift <- df_shift %>%
  group_by(poolsize) %>%
  summarise(mean_delta = mean(delta_ct, na.rm = TRUE),
            se = sd(delta_ct, na.rm = TRUE)/sqrt(n()),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(log2_ps = log2(poolsize))

ggplot(mean_shift, aes(x = log2_ps, y = mean_delta)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_delta - 1.96*se,
                    ymax = mean_delta + 1.96*se),
                width = 0.05) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(x = expression(log[2]~"(pool size)"),
       y = expression("Mean"~Delta*C[t]),
       subtitle = "Dashed: ideal 1 Ct per twofold dilution") +
  theme_minimal()

```
